name: nvidia-setup
description: Install and validate NVIDIA drivers, CUDA, Fabric Manager, and Docker GPU access on Ubuntu GPU servers.

interface.shortDescription: Install and validate the NVIDIA software stack on Linux servers.
interface.longDescription: Detect GPU hardware, pick a current driver branch, install drivers and CUDA, configure Docker GPU support, and validate the stack end-to-end.
defaultPrompt: Detect the GPU and choose a current NVIDIA driver branch.
Install drivers, CUDA, and Docker GPU support on this Ubuntu server.
Validate that Docker and the host both see the GPUs.
